legacy.content:
# Phase 33-02 Plan: Feature-first schema and runtime pack loading
## Objective
Align space modeling terminology and contracts so features are the base stats, spaces are projections, and KAPLAY/docs tooling consume runtime content-pack vectors.
## Tasks
1. Add `featureSchema` to `space-vectors` content pack contract. 2. Expose runtime helpers: - `getFeatureSchema(overrides?)` - `getSpaceFeatureIds(spaceId, overrides?)` 3. Keep compatibility with existing `traits` and `features` structures while treating both as labeled feature groups. 4. Wire KAPLAY boot to load `spaceVectors` from bundle and optional thematic-basis slice. 5. Surface vector hints in KAPLAY scenes to validate runtime model usage. 6. Update docs for runtime loading + KAPLAY quickstart.
## Verification
- `packages/engine` builds with new contract. - `docs-site` typecheck passes with refactored Space Explorer wiring. - Content bundle includes `spaceVectors` hash payload.
